title: Authority
description: The scoped, expiring delegation under which an Actor acts.

scope.description: The permissions granted, as a machine-comparable set.

issued_at.description: When the grant was made (Unix seconds).

expires_at.description: When the grant ceases to be valid (Unix seconds). Non-expiring Authority MUST NOT be issued.

parent.description: id of the Authority this one was derived from (chain link).

policy_ref.description: Policy version to evaluate this Authority under.
